spacing_and_layout.padding_scale: Generous spacing. Use p-8, p-12, p-16 for sections to create breathing room.
spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Editorial Mode (Tetris Grid). Asymmetrical grids for articles (e.g., col-span-8 and col-span-4).
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: Rounded-xl for cards, mixed with sharp edges for a modern editorial feel.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: RTL by default. Use text-right for standard content. Optical alignment prioritizing Arabic reading direction.

navigation.style: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FAF8F5]/80 border-b border-[#E2DAC8]/50. Must include RTL layout.
navigation.shadcn_overrides: Remove default ring colors, use brand primary for focus states.

hero_cover.style: Full height (min-h-[80vh]), split layout or large image with 'معاً نبني جسوراً نحو النجاح' in massive Amiri font. Use subtle noise texture.

cards_articles.style: Go cardless or use subtle borders (border-[#E2DAC8]). Avoid heavy shadows. Images should have elegant aspect ratios (e.g., 3:4 or 16:9).

forms.style: For 'مقترحات أولياء الأمور' (Parents Suggestions) and 'رأيك يهمنا' (Opinion). Customize Shadcn inputs with bg-white, border-[#E2DAC8], focus:ring-[#8B9D83].

admin_panel.style: Clean, high-contrast structural layout. Use Shadcn tables, tabs, and dialogs. Must support RTL.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Images scale up slightly (scale-105) on hover within hidden overflow. Text changes color to brand accent.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Framer motion staggered fade-ins for grid items.
motion_and_interactions.scrolling: Use lenis for smooth scrolling if possible, or native smooth behavior.

media.icons: Use lucide-react (ensure flip for RTL if directional).

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over images has dark gradient overlays (e.g., bg-black/40).
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: All interactive elements must have data-testid (e.g., data-testid='submit-suggestion-button', data-testid='article-card-1').

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Add `dir="rtl"` to the HTML tag or main wrapper. The entire UI must be built for Right-to-Left.
Use Tailwind's standard padding/margin. In RTL, ml-4 becomes mr-4 visually if using logical properties. Prefer logical properties like ps-4, pe-4, ms-4, me-4.
Do NOT use 'Inter' font. Import and use 'Amiri' for headings and 'Cairo' for body.
Construct the homepage as a scrolling editorial experience: Hero (Cover) -> Towards a Conscious Path -> Latest News -> Excellence Spotlight -> Feedback Form.
Build a separate Admin Panel route (e.g., /admin) for managing articles and viewing suggestions.
Use Shadcn UI for forms, tabs, and dialogs, but customize the visual style to match the Organic Earthy theme (beige/sage green).
